violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -PIC placed can opener and mixer parts to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the Rose Lane 2 kitchen door and main entrance door, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Old residue label observed on container lid that were stacked on top of one another where the old residue label was in direct contact with food contact surfaces of the lids. -Staff removed lids to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walls behind the dishwasher and kitchen vent in back prep area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The lights in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Per PIC a service order has been placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Cheese and sliced fruit were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold rail. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in unit from walk-in 1 hour ago. Items were moved back to walk-in. Establishment to use single pans inside instead of double pans. Establishment to temp foods in unit to ensure new method keeps food at adequate temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and slicer have an accumulation of bio-film and food debris respectively. Establishment to increase cleaning frequency of ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
The lights in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
